title: Luna Abyss
desc: Luna Abyss is a single player story driven action-adventure with fluid platforming and bullet hell combat. Follow the journey of Fawkes, a prisoner of Luna caught between a cryptic prophecy and their prison sentence.

title: Lost in Cheese
desc: Cheese is blocking your way. Push cheese and clear the path to the big red button. A cozy puzzle adventure about cheese. Can you outsmart the cheese?

title: Schrodinger's Cat Burglar
desc: A puzzle heist adventure with a quantum flavour! The player controls Mittens the cat as she stumbles into a quantum experiment and gains incredible new powers - the ability to be in two places at once. Explore, solve logic puzzles and evade capture by pest control robots to ultimately save the day!

title: Attack of The Worker
desc: "Attack of the Worker" is a rogue-lite, pixel-style bullet shooting game where players experience the life of a worker in a tech company.

title: Backpacker Guild
desc: Welcome to the Backpacker Guild. To vanquish wicked monsters, hire diverse mercenaries and craft powerful items to pack their bags. Only by the hands of you, the guild master, can powerful mercenaries be created.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II
desc: Fast-paced tactical combat meets strategic management in this sequel to the acclaimed Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus. Take control of either the ancient and deathless Necron legions or the techno-religious acolytes of the Omnissiah, with the fate of a world in your hands.

title: Table Flip Simulator
desc: Had a stressful day? Blow off some steam in Table Flip Simulator! This physics-based puzzler allows you to unwind as you throw or smash items with hilarious effects. From working as a barista to becoming the President of Antarctica, you can go beyond flipping the table – the world is yours to wreck!

title: Gravelord
desc: Gravelord is a fast-paced boomer shooter voiced by a badass protagonist featuring hand-crafted levels filled with secrets and hordes of enemies to kill. Dish out some brutal carnage with powerful guns and collect Tarot Cards to gain even more killing power. Let's put the fun back in funeral!

title: Coffee Talk: Tokyo
desc: Coffee Talk: Tokyo is the newest instalment of the beloved coffee brewing and heart-to-heart talking simulator. It brings the warmth, heart, and delicious drinks from the previous games to an all-new café in Tokyo where humans and yokai alike share their stories.

title: Turnout
desc: A 1v1 strategy horror game where a train rapidly approaches your location. Guess the numbers, rely on your luck, or strategize to not end up as roadkill, remove the before they remove you from the game.

title: Hillshade Farm
desc: You’ve got land, time, and a whole lot to figure out. Start small, work hard, earn what you need, and build the kind of farm you’d never want to leave.

title: Alchemist: Journey of the Soul
desc: First-person adventure game, playable solo or co-op with up to 4 people. Travel through unique areas, uncover memories and use them to craft powerful potions. Unlock special abilities and solve puzzles in a mysterious world. Will your soul survive this journey?

title: Ex Sanguis
desc: From the creators of Othercide, Ex Sanguis delivers what the studio is known for: dynamic & epic turn-based combat in a visually striking world. Bleed the world to life; fight the agents of perfection and stillness through strategic blood baths in this evolved roguelite tactical RPG game!

title: Burden Street Station
desc:
Burden Street Station is a surreal narrative game set in a liminal train station about helping a cast of unusual creatures and spirits move on with their lives.

Collect personality traits through talking and exploration, and wear them to unlock dialogue options and advance their stories.

You will come to know these spirits very well. You will learn a lot about them.

title: Walk The Frog
desc: Guide Froggo through a world on sticky notes and relax while solving the puzzle of his journey home. Make new quirky friends, help each other out and overcome many obstacles. It’s a cozy and heartwarming point&click adventure with a unique and easy drag&drop puzzle style.

title: Forsaken Valley
desc: A narrative RPG where your emotions are not stats. They are your story. Explore, create things, communicate with tribes and solve all the mysteries of this strange place. Thousands of enemies stand in your way, whether you can crush them is up to you.

title: Long Live My Lady!
desc: A lone gnome, a sleeping princess and a sea of beer. Take care of your mistress by becoming the manager of the only tavern in the entire Dungeon!

title: Zero Parades: For Dead Spies
desc: From ZA/UM comes ZERO PARADES: For Dead Spies – a story-rich espionage RPG. You're a brilliant but tormented operant on a desperate assignment. Pick up the pieces of your broken network, untangle a bloody web of intrigue at the End of History, and prove yourself on the big stage or blow it all up – again.

title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book
desc:
Join Yoshi for a new adventure in Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, launching on Nintendo Switch 2 in spring 2026.

One day, on the island where Yoshi and his friends live, a peculiar talking book named Mr. E suddenly falls from the sky. This peculiar book’s pages contain information about unusual creatures, so Yoshi decides to jump in and help investigate!

As Yoshi wanders through the book, you'll make all sorts of discoveries about the creatures you find and those discoveries will be written down. You'll find lots of unusual creatures residing within the book – a page-turning adventure awaits!

title: Noneworld
desc: NONEWORLD is a cute RPG set in a dying world. You are a Princess from another world, accompanied by an omnipresent Cheshire Cat. Only YOU and your fruity colored allies can LIGHT THE WORLD and return home safely.

title: Super Climb Up!!
desc: Vertical platformer about breaking blocks, hiking through nature, and maybe cleaning up some messes along the way!

title: The House Always Wins
desc: Design and expand your dream casino solo or in co-op. Keep gamblers happy, manage operations, and tackle hilarious chaos — from vandals to fires — as you rise to the top of the gambling world.

title: Psyvariar 3
desc: Play as one of 7 pilots in this thrilling sequel to a SHMUP classic. The time has come for a new generation of Psyvariars to rise… and save humanity.

title: Retail Hell
desc: A horror job simulator set in a convenience store in purgatory. Serve non human customers, fight collapsing inventory, survive curses, and uncover why your shift never ends.

title: Paklyx
desc: PAKLYX is a turn-based puzzle game about finding the correct sequence of moves. Use special buttons to manipulate timers, delay them, and collect all keys in the level.

title: Drop and Grow
desc: A short incremental clicker about dropping water to grow plants. Sit back and relax while you grow more and more plants.

title: Bufo Jump
desc: Bufo Jump is a 3D platformer where you hop, climb, and glide through colorful worlds, mysterious caves, and a menacing industrial site. Play as Bufo, a brave frog on a mission to save his pond from a greedy corporation polluting the land. Leap your way to the company's core and take back your pond.

title: Butcherman
desc: Experience the psychological horror of being kidnapped by a serial killer. Driven to escape, explore everything around you, use your wits, uncover secrets, and face the unimaginable dread of being in the victim’s place. Based on a true story.

title: FZ: Formation Z
desc: Ready yourself for an intense robot shooting raid battle like never before.

title: House Flipper 2: Sakura DLC
desc: Travel with us to Japan in House Flipper 2: Sakura DLC! Renovate a tearoom, an onsen, a school… Or use spring- and Japan-themed items to build your own traditional Japanese house, and sell it to one of the new, distinctive buyers!

title: Toilet Paper Idle
desc: Toilet Paper Idle is a chill incremental idle clicker game about consuming as much toilet papers as possible with the help of helpers, skills, and upgrades. Discover special types of toilet papers as you progress, and be careful to not clog your toilet!

title: Hyper Euphoria
desc: The command-selection adventure game that flourished back when PCs were still called microcomputers makes a comeback. Can you withstand the nonstop MAX 264km/h action that comes at you wave after wave!?

title: King of Tokyo
desc:
Turn into a kaiju as you destroy everything in your path in this fast-paced dice game! Roll the dice and find the best possible combinations to rule over Tokyo, whether you choose to heal yourself, attack, buy cards or win Victory Points.

Adapt your strategy to become the King of Tokyo at the right moment and attack all your opponents at the same time.

The first player to reach 20 Victory Points wins the game… and so does the last player to stay alive!

title: Rebellion Princess
desc: Raise your favorite characters and have them ready to fight in the next run! Command beautiful girls to defend the castle and princess A non-reset roguelite × tower defense

title: Berserker Onslaught
desc:
"Berserker Onslaught" is an action roguelike infused with survival and loot-hunting elements.
Face relentless waves of monsters, harness the blessings of the gods to strengthen yourself, repel evil forces, and return with bountiful rewards.

title: Nice to Meet You, Again
desc: Nice to Meet You, Again is a dramatic story by veteran visual novel developer, Purple software. How would you rewrite your life if given the chance to travel 13 years in to the past?

title: BBS (Bulletin Board System) Magica
desc: Magical Girl Programming ✖︎ auto-battle! An office worker is assigned to manage a fan exchange bulletin board when she was once a magical girl, Become a magical girl in cyberspace and protect the message board.

title: Planet Wow Wildlife Adventure
desc: Experience wild adventures!

title: Q Collection
desc: No description available

title: Dawgs: The Revenge
desc: Dawgs: The Revenge is an unhinged, genre-bending physics sandbox of pure chaotic action. You play as a highly customizable, aggressively squishy ball of fury on a quest for absolute vengeance. What starts as a simple mission escalates into a multi-genre fever dream!

title: Whose Lawn Is It Anyway
desc: Step into the paws of a mischievous dog or a calculating cat and turn this quiet street into your personal playground of chaos. This is a short, 15-minute adventure about being a very, very bad pet.

title: Car Sales Simulator 2026
desc: Buy. Restore. Expand.

title: Dino Evolution: Catch Dinosaurs and Raise Anime Primeval Boys
desc:
Prehistoric. Powerful. Surprisingly dateable.
Catch them. Transform them. Fall for them.

title: Habitat Shapes: The Tropical Journey
desc: Build, Discover, and Bring Nature to Life

title: Flight Simulator 2026
desc: Hit the throttle, hit the checkpoints, beat the clock.

title: Dino Evolution: Catch Dinosaurs and Raise Anime Primeval Girls
desc: No description available

title: Sapphire Tempest
desc: Become the mage feared by darkness itself.

title: Eggconsole Laydock 2 Last Attack MSX2+
desc: The epic conclusion to the Laydock series. High stakes, relentless patterns, and pure tactical satisfaction.

title: Coffee Talk: Tokyo - Deluxe Edition
desc: No description available

title: Game & Console Supermarket: Gold Edition
desc: No description available
